title: Beam Global Full Year 2025 Operating Results
text: Full year 2025 revenue totaled $28.2 million, down from $49.3 million in 2024. Q4 showed momentum with $9.0 million in revenue, representing a 56% increase over Q3 2025. Commercial revenue grew to 72% in 2025 from 38% in 2024. Gross profit declined to $3.5 million (13% margin) from $7.3 million (15% margin) year-over-year. Excluding non-cash depreciation, adjusted gross margin improved to 23% from 21.2%, indicating better unit economics despite lower sales volume. Operating expenses increased to $31.1 million from $19.0 million, primarily due to a $10.8 million goodwill impairment charge. Excluding non-cash items, operating expenses decreased 17% to $16.1 million, demonstrating cost discipline. The company maintains a strong financial position with no debt and $100 million in unused credit capacity. Working capital stood at $8.9 million at year-end, down from $13.8 million, with cash of $969 thousand. The revenue decrease stemmed from cessation of U.S. federal government orders following policy reversals on EV infrastructure, though non-government customer revenue increased approximately 50% year-over-year.
